title: oldenlandia scandens
intro: Oldenlandia scandens, also known as creeping oldenlandia, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The health benefits of Oldenlandia scandens include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, Oldenlandia scandens is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
